response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with strong polyglot abilities and distributed systems experience, but he lacks the executive-level leadership required for a CTO role. There is no evidence on his resume of scaling engineering organizations, managing external delivery partners, or reporting to a board. Furthermore, while he has recent exposure to AI tooling, he lacks the specialized experience of architecting stateful multi-agent AI systems for real-time fintech credit risk and trade decisioning demanded by the hard requirements.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience with strong backend and distributed systems expertise, including high-throughput microservices.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, specifically Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic frameworks.
Demonstrated architectural initiative and system design skills as the founder and lead developer of an event-driven open-source platform (GISCollective).
concerns: Lacks executive leadership experience; no track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or establishing technical governance at a venture-backed scale-up.
Missing deep domain expertise in AI-native fintech infrastructure, algorithmic working-capital management, and real-time credit risk.
AI experience appears limited to recent developer tooling rather than operating complex, stateful multi-agent systems in high-stakes commercial or regulated environments.
